business_ideas.idea: EasyBrain: 750M downloads of simple number game apps; free traffic monetized via ads.
Poker.com as platform to play poker and connect to real money sites.
Crossword.com and crossword.com puzzle platforms with premium tiers.
Lobby.com: software to digitize doctor office waiting rooms and scheduling.
OpenDoor for business sales: instant liquidity buyout platform for online businesses.
Raise.com: resell gift cards at discount, massive traffic and engagement.
Trading card buyout service: shoebox model, instant appraisal and payment.
DTC brand international fulfillment partner: handle Australia/EU expansion royalty-based.
Turned Yellow: drop servicing for cartoon portrait commissions via ads.

predictions.text: Raise.com will become a billion-dollar plus company.
Chess.com likely worth $250M+ given 200M monthly uniques and subscription model.
